calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Stauts On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 29, 2018, is admitted to probate. Wendy Nan Marcus is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-15-2023 Continued To May-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-22-305891 Estate of Kim Warren Marcus and PYR-22-305892 Marcus Family Living Trust.

Appearances; Janet Espy appearing via zoom for and with (Surviving spouse and Trustee) Wendy Nan Marcus appearing via zoom.

The Court noted that the will gifts the residue of the estate to Mrs. Marcus in trust, that Probate Code 13501(b) requires probate administration if property is gifted in trust under the will. Mrs. Espy stated that this is a situation where because of circumstances and the terms of the trust, its revocable by the surviving spouse, that the surviving spouse is the sole beneficiary and the trustee, and that having to follow the requirement is a waste to judicial resources. The Court stated that Probate Code 13656(b) requires it to issue an order regarding any property not passing to the surviving spouse and that 50% of the community property must be probated. Mrs. Espy stated that I as separate property, that the property was an inheritance of the decedent's parents trust, that had not been completely collected and that it was all left to Mrs. Marcus' trust where she is the trustee and is revocable. The Petition for spousal property is under submission. The Petition for appointment of successor trustee and waiver of bond is under submission with the courts intent to grant as prayed to appoint Wendy Marcus without requiring bond.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh; not reported.
